steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to make and support a claim about the inspiration for kumiko patterns. A strong answer must (1) state what inspires the patterns and (2) provide specific evidence from the notes that backs that claim.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'wooden strips as inspiration': Misidentifies the source of inspiration as the construction material rather than nature. Wrong claim. ✗
  • Choice B — 'construction details...': Focuses on how kumiko is built, not what inspires its patterns. Fails the inspiration requirement. ✗
  • Choice C — no inspiration claim': Describes kumiko patterns without ever stating what inspires them. Incomplete. ✗
  • Choice D — 'nature inspires... seigaiha resembles ocean waves': States the claim (geometric patterns inspired by nature) and supports it with a specific example from the notes (the seigaiha pattern's curved fan shapes resembling ocean waves). ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
